basic_details.job_title: BEL Advisor Kavach System Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) Advisor Kavach System Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.bel-india.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BEL Advisor Kavach System Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years as on 01 April 2026. Post-retirement experience considered for age relaxation; maximum tenure up to 68 years.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech in Electronics & Telecommunication / Electronics & Communication / Electronics
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech in Electronics & Telecommunication / Electronics & Communication / Electronics. Minimum 3 years experience as Joint Director/Tele or ED/Tele or PED/Tele or equivalent in Indian Railways signaling systems, or Chief Signal & Telecom Engineer (CSTE), or ED/PED in Railway PSU.

salary_details.pay_scale: Last drawn basic pay at the time of superannuation from previous Government Organisation, increased by 5% annually on extension
salary_details.details: Last drawn basic pay at the time of superannuation from previous Government Organisation, increased by 5% annually on extension.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BEL Advisor Kavach System Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.bel-india.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BEL Advisor Kavach System recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the BEL Advisor Kavach System recruitment is 14 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Advisor Kavach System post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the Advisor Kavach System post announced by Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Advisor Kavach System position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B.Tech degree in Electronics & Telecommunication, Electronics & Communication, or Electronics, along with specific experience in Indian Railways signaling systems or equivalent.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Advisor Kavach System role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Advisor Kavach System post is 65 years as of 01 April 2026. Age relaxation may apply based on post-retirement experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Advisor Kavach System post?
faq.answer: The salary will be based on the last drawn basic pay at the time of superannuation from the previous Government Organisation, with a 5% annual increase on extension.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the BEL Advisor Kavach System recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply offline by downloading the application form from the BEL website, filling it correctly, and sending it to the official address before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Advisor Kavach System post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve the shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for the Advisor Kavach System post is Kotdwar, Uttarakhand.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with post-retirement experience apply?
faq.answer: Yes, post-retirement experience is considered for this role, and the maximum tenure can extend up to 68 years.
